task_description: find all files with uppercase letters in their names
code:
import os

def find_uppercase_files():
    for filename in os.listdir("."):
        if filename.isupper():
            print(filename)

print("Finished searching for uppercase files.")

```python
import os

for filename in os.listdir("."):
    if filename.isupper():
        print(filename)
    elif filename.islower():
        print(f"Ignoring file: {filename}")
    else:
        print(f"Unknown file type: {filename}")
